name: status-workflow
description: Test SPI status skill — cross-repo dashboard, focused queries, alert detection, workflow health

steps.name: full-dashboard
steps.prompt: give me a status dashboard across all my SPI fork repos

assertions.description: Queries multiple fork repos for issues and PRs

steps.name: blocked-cascades
steps.prompt: are there any blocked cascades across the SPI forks?

assertions.description: Checks for cascade-blocked and human-required labels

steps.name: sync-prs
steps.prompt: what upstream sync PRs need review?

assertions.description: Checks for sync PRs with review status

steps.name: failing-workflows
steps.prompt: are any workflows failing on main across the SPI forks?

assertions.description: Checks workflow run conclusions on main branch

steps.name: human-required-issues
steps.prompt: check for any human-required issues across all fork repos

steps.name: branch-divergence
steps.prompt: how far has fork_integration drifted from main across repos?

assertions.description: Checks branch divergence via GitHub compare API

steps.name: clean-result
steps.prompt: is everything clean across the SPI forks? no issues, no blocked cascades?

assertions.description: Provides explicit clean/healthy statement when no alerts

steps.name: boundary-test-forks
steps.prompt: initialize a new fork for the notification service from the template
